title: Royal Families Head to the Reverie
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on royal families head to the reverie within the The World Prepares for the Reverie storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: East Blue, Loguetown

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Congratu- Lations on your recent Coronation, your Majesty.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: On their way to the reverie, once every four years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Please, make your- selves at home.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I've seen worse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What do you think, dear?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Our hotel is built to serve only those Royals...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's definitely nothing special.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All it offers is a view of gold D. Roger's Gallows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: W... well, I hope you can rest away the cares of your travels,

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: King Stelly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now begone with you. Trash belongs in the can.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The reason many a country are abuzz...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: is because of the meeting that happens once every four years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: At the center of the world, the Holy Land Mariejois...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Reverie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: At this conference of the world's greatest authorities,

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: kings and Queens from over 50 of the world's countries gather...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: and discuss the goings-on of global affairs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: together, they form a guiding plan for the years to come.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But a peaceful, productive exchange...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: between the eccentric heads of the world's states is often a tall order.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: West Blue, Kano Country

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don chinjao... or, well, sail has yet to return.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The war is over!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It seems they will not make it in time for the Reverie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There are many things I wish for them to say.

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: South Blue, Evil Black Drum Kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: MAAA AHAHA HAHA!

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: Sakura Kingdom?! Stupid Dolton!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How shall we bring them down?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Grand line

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: Sakura kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WhAA- AAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't give me that ex- Asperated look!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Like I said, I'm going to be the ship's doctor for the voyage! You should be jumping for joy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The country of passion, Dressrossa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can I go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How about as my lady- in-waiting?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sure! Thank you, Viola!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I bet you're excited!

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: PRODENCE KINGDOM

dialogue.speaker: World Royals
dialogue.text: King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I re- fused the escort ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's go together! To the Holy Land!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Everyone is acting like we're off on some sort of vacation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And what's wrong with that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is for all intents and purposes a festival!

summary: Royal Families Head to the Reverie: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
